title: Ship v2.0 bootstrap installer and canonical docs set
description: AOF needs a managed-project bootstrap path that installs the canonical .aof file set and AI-readable operating packet, while reducing the active docs surface to a small v2.0 canonical set.
triage_notes: Renumbered from open TASK-005 after organization-audit exposed a historical task-id collision with the already-completed visibility-output task.
